---
title: "First and second stage sampling 0318"
author: "Ruisi Ma"
date: "2026-03-18"
output:
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# First-stage PSU sampling for Detroit project
# PSU = Census tract (after combining small tracts if needed)
# Method = systematic PPS using composite MOS
# File: Detroit MI.xlsx

## 0. Packages
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(sampling)
library(purrr)

## 1. Read data
file_path <- "C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/745 code/Detroit MI.xlsx"

tract_raw <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "Tract")
bg_raw    <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = "BlockGroup")

## 2. Clean IDs
tract_raw <- tract_raw %>%
  mutate(Tract = as.character(Tract))

bg_raw <- bg_raw %>%
  mutate(
    BlockGroup = as.character(BlockGroup),
    Tract = substr(BlockGroup, 1, 11)
  )

## 3. Build tract frame
tract <- tract_raw %>%
  distinct(Tract, .keep_all = TRUE)

bg_counts <- bg_raw %>%
  count(Tract, name = "n_BG")

tract <- tract %>%
  left_join(bg_counts, by = "Tract") %>%
  mutate(n_BG = ifelse(is.na(n_BG), 0L, n_BG))

## 4. Construct age-domain counts
tract <- tract %>%
  mutate(
    Q1_18_34 =
      Male18to19Yrs + Male20Yrs + Male21Yrs + Male22to24Yrs +
      Male25to29Yrs + Male30to34Yrs +
      Female18to19Yrs + Female20Yrs + Female21Yrs + Female22to24Yrs +
      Female25to29Yrs + Female30to34Yrs,

    Q2_35_49 =
      Male35to39Yrs + Male40to44Yrs + Male45to49Yrs +
      Female35to39Yrs + Female40to44Yrs + Female45to49Yrs,

    Q3_50_64 =
      Male50to54Yrs + Male55to59Yrs + Male60to61Yrs + Male62to64Yrs +
      Female50to54Yrs + Female55to59Yrs + Female60to61Yrs + Female62to64Yrs,

    Q4_65plus =
      Male65to66Yrs + Male67to69Yrs + Male70to74Yrs + Male75to79Yrs +
      Male80to84Yrs + MaleGE85Yrs +
      Female65to66Yrs + Female67to69Yrs + Female70to74Yrs + Female75to79Yrs +
      Female80to84Yrs + FemaleGE85Yrs
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TotAdult18plus = Q1_18_34 + Q2_35_49 + Q3_50_64 + Q4_65plus
  )

## 5. Domain targets and rates
n1 <- 250; n2 <- 250; n3 <- 250; n4 <- 250
r1 <- 0.35; r2 <- 0.45; r3 <- 0.50; r4 <- 0.65

m1 <- n1 / r1
m2 <- n2 / r2
m3 <- n3 / r3
m4 <- n4 / r4

Q1_total <- sum(tract$Q1_18_34, na.rm = TRUE)
Q2_total <- sum(tract$Q2_35_49, na.rm = TRUE)
Q3_total <- sum(tract$Q3_50_64, na.rm = TRUE)
Q4_total <- sum(tract$Q4_65plus, na.rm = TRUE)

f1 <- m1 / Q1_total
f2 <- m2 / Q2_total
f3 <- m3 / Q3_total
f4 <- m4 / Q4_total

domain_rates <- data.frame(
  domain = c("18-34", "35-49", "50-64", "65+"),
  n_resp = c(n1, n2, n3, n4),
  resp_rate = c(r1, r2, r3, r4),
  m_selected = c(m1, m2, m3, m4),
  Q_total = c(Q1_total, Q2_total, Q3_total, Q4_total),
  f_d = c(f1, f2, f3, f4)
)

print(domain_rates)

## 6. Composite MOS at tract level
## Si = sum_d f_d * Qi(d)
tract <- tract %>%
  mutate(
    Si =
      f1 * Q1_18_34 +
      f2 * Q2_35_49 +
      f3 * Q3_50_64 +
      f4 * Q4_65plus
  )

## 7. Remove zero-MOS tracts from active sampling frame
## Keep them for documentation/QC
tract_zero_mos <- tract %>%
  filter(Si <= 0)

tract_pos <- tract %>%
  filter(Si > 0) %>%
  arrange(Tract)

## 8. Initial qbarbar using uncombined positive-MOS tracts
## Used only to identify small tracts that must be handled
m_psu <- 40
nbar  <- 1

S_total_initial <- sum(tract_pos$Si, na.rm = TRUE)
qbarbar_initial <- S_total_initial / (m_psu * nbar)

tract_pos <- tract_pos %>%
  mutate(
    pi1_initial = m_psu * Si / S_total_initial,
    w1_initial  = 1 / pi1_initial,
    fail_bg     = n_BG < 2,
    fail_qi     = qbarbar_initial > TotAdult18plus,
    fail_pi     = pi1_initial > 1
  )

## 9. Identify tracts needing special handling
## Main combine rule:
## - n_BG < 2 OR
## - qbarbar > adult population
tract_pos <- tract_pos %>%
  mutate(
    must_combine = fail_bg | fail_qi
  )

combine_candidates <- tract_pos %>%
  filter(must_combine)

print(combine_candidates %>%
        select(Tract, NAME, n_BG, TotAdult18plus, Si,
               pi1_initial, w1_initial, fail_bg, fail_qi))

## 10. Create tract-to-tract links for combining
## - sort by Tract
## - each flagged tract is linked to the nearest available tract
## - avoid re-using a tract that is already assigned
##
## This is an operational adjacency proxy based on tract order.
tract_ids <- tract_pos$Tract
used_as_partner <- character(0)

find_partner <- function(target_tract, all_tracts, flagged_tracts, already_used) {
  idx <- match(target_tract, all_tracts)

  # search outward from nearest neighbors in sorted order
  offsets <- c(rbind(seq(1, length(all_tracts)), -seq(1, length(all_tracts))))
  offsets <- offsets[!is.na(offsets)]

  for (off in offsets) {
    j <- idx + off
    if (j >= 1 && j <= length(all_tracts)) {
      cand <- all_tracts[j]

      # cannot partner with itself
      # cannot partner with a tract already used as partner
      # cannot partner with another flagged tract that is itself waiting to be linked
      if (cand != target_tract &&
          !(cand %in% already_used) &&
          !(cand %in% flagged_tracts)) {
        return(cand)
      }
    }
  }
  return(NA_character_)
}

flagged_tracts <- tract_pos %>%
  filter(must_combine) %>%
  pull(Tract)

combine_map <- data.frame(
  tract_small = character(0),
  tract_partner = character(0),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (tr in flagged_tracts) {
  if (!(tr %in% combine_map$tract_small) && !(tr %in% used_as_partner)) {
    partner <- find_partner(
      target_tract = tr,
      all_tracts = tract_ids,
      flagged_tracts = flagged_tracts,
      already_used = used_as_partner
    )

    if (!is.na(partner)) {
      combine_map <- bind_rows(
        combine_map,
        data.frame(
          tract_small   = tr,
          tract_partner = partner,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      )
      used_as_partner <- c(used_as_partner, partner)
    }
  }
}

print(combine_map)

## 11. Build combined PSU IDs
## For:
## - small tract + partner => one combined PSU
## - all others => PSU is the tract itself
tract_pos <- tract_pos %>%
  mutate(
    PSU_ID = Tract,
    combine_status = "single"
  )

if (nrow(combine_map) > 0) {
  for (k in 1:nrow(combine_map)) {
    a <- combine_map$tract_small[k]
    b <- combine_map$tract_partner[k]
    new_id <- paste0(a, "_", b)

    tract_pos$PSU_ID[tract_pos$Tract %in% c(a, b)] <- new_id
    tract_pos$combine_status[tract_pos$Tract == a] <- "small_combined"
    tract_pos$combine_status[tract_pos$Tract == b] <- "partner_combined"
  }
}

## 12. Aggregate to combined PSU frame
## After combining, MOS and counts are sums across linked tracts
psu_frame <- tract_pos %>%
  group_by(PSU_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    component_tracts = paste(sort(Tract), collapse = ","),
    NAME = paste(NAME, collapse = " | "),
    n_tracts = n(),
    TotHH = sum(TotHH, na.rm = TRUE),
    TotPerson = sum(TotPerson, na.rm = TRUE),
    TotAdult18plus = sum(TotAdult18plus, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_BG = sum(n_BG, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_18_34 = sum(Q1_18_34, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q2_35_49 = sum(Q2_35_49, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_50_64 = sum(Q3_50_64, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q4_65plus = sum(Q4_65plus, na.rm = TRUE),
    Si = sum(Si, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_tract = min(Tract),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(min_tract)

## 13. Recalculate first-stage constants on combined PSU frame
## This is the frame that will actually be sampled
S_total <- sum(psu_frame$Si, na.rm = TRUE)
qbarbar <- S_total / (m_psu * nbar)
interval <- S_total / m_psu

psu_frame <- psu_frame %>%
  mutate(
    pi1 = m_psu * Si / S_total,
    w1_base = 1 / pi1,
    fail_qi_after = qbarbar > TotAdult18plus,
    fail_pi_after = pi1 > 1
  )

cat("Total combined PSUs in frame =", nrow(psu_frame), "\n")
cat("Total composite MOS S =", S_total, "\n")
cat("Expected workload per SSU qbarbar =", qbarbar, "\n")
cat("Systematic PPS interval =", interval, "\n")

## 14. QC after combining
## These are the checks that should be reported
qc_combined_fail_qi <- psu_frame %>%
  filter(fail_qi_after) %>%
  select(PSU_ID, component_tracts, TotAdult18plus, Si, pi1)

qc_combined_fail_pi <- psu_frame %>%
  filter(fail_pi_after) %>%
  select(PSU_ID, component_tracts, TotAdult18plus, Si, pi1)

qc_combined_small_weights <- psu_frame %>%
  arrange(desc(w1_base)) %>%
  select(PSU_ID, component_tracts, TotAdult18plus, n_BG, Si, pi1, w1_base)

combine_summary <- tract_pos %>%
  count(combine_status)

print(combine_summary)
print(qc_combined_fail_qi)
print(qc_combined_fail_pi)
print(head(qc_combined_small_weights, 15))

## 15. Systematic PPS selection on COMBINED PSU FRAME
## Sort by tract GEOID proxy = min tract in combined PSU
set.seed(-77)

s_psu <- UPsystematic(psu_frame$pi1)

psu_frame <- psu_frame %>%
  mutate(
    sample_psu = as.integer(s_psu)
  )

psu_sample <- psu_frame %>%
  filter(sample_psu == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    PSU_weight = 1 / pi1
  )

cat("Number of sampled PSUs =", nrow(psu_sample), "\n")

```


```{r}
# Frame file required by project
frame_out <- psu_frame %>%
  select(
    PSU_ID, component_tracts, n_tracts, NAME,
    TotHH, TotPerson, TotAdult18plus, n_BG,
    Q1_18_34, Q2_35_49, Q3_50_64, Q4_65plus,
    Si, pi1, w1_base
  )

# Sample file required by project
sample_out <- psu_sample %>%
  select(
    PSU_ID, component_tracts, n_tracts, NAME,
    TotHH, TotPerson, TotAdult18plus, n_BG,
    Q1_18_34, Q2_35_49, Q3_50_64, Q4_65plus,
    Si, pi1, PSU_weight
  )

# Documentation of links used for tract-level combining
combine_out <- combine_map

write.csv(frame_out, "FRAME1_first_stage_combined.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sample_out, "SAMPLE_first_stage_PSU_combined.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(combine_out, "TRACT_COMBINING_MAP.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# QC outputs
write.csv(tract_zero_mos, "QC_zero_MOS_tracts_excluded.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(combine_candidates, "QC_initial_small_tract_candidates.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(qc_combined_fail_qi, "QC_after_combining_fail_qi.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(qc_combined_fail_pi, "QC_after_combining_fail_pi.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(qc_combined_small_weights, "QC_after_combining_weights.csv", row.names = FALSE)

## ---------------------------
## Summary output
## ---------------------------
summary_out <- data.frame(
  total_tracts_raw = nrow(tract_raw),
  unique_tracts = nrow(tract),
  zero_MOS_tracts_excluded = nrow(tract_zero_mos),
  positive_MOS_tracts = nrow(tract_pos),
  initial_small_tract_candidates = nrow(combine_candidates),
  number_of_combined_pairs = nrow(combine_map),
  final_combined_PSUs_in_frame = nrow(psu_frame),
  sampled_PSUs = nrow(psu_sample),
  S_total = S_total,
  qbarbar = qbarbar,
  interval = interval,
  min_pi1 = min(psu_frame$pi1),
  max_pi1 = max(psu_frame$pi1)
)

print(summary_out)
write.csv(summary_out, "SUMMARY_first_stage_combined.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Second-stage SSU sampling for Detroit project
# APPEND after the first-stage code
# Do NOT reset set.seed(-77)

## 16. Prepare BG frame
bg <- bg_raw %>%
  distinct(BlockGroup, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    BlockGroup = as.character(BlockGroup),
    Tract = substr(BlockGroup, 1, 11)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Q1_18_34 =
      Male18to19Yrs + Male20Yrs + Male21Yrs + Male22to24Yrs +
      Male25to29Yrs + Male30to34Yrs +
      Female18to19Yrs + Female20Yrs + Female21Yrs + Female22to24Yrs +
      Female25to29Yrs + Female30to34Yrs,

    Q2_35_49 =
      Male35to39Yrs + Male40to44Yrs + Male45to49Yrs +
      Female35to39Yrs + Female40to44Yrs + Female45to49Yrs,

    Q3_50_64 =
      Male50to54Yrs + Male55to59Yrs + Male60to61Yrs + Male62to64Yrs +
      Female50to54Yrs + Female55to59Yrs + Female60to61Yrs + Female62to64Yrs,

    Q4_65plus =
      Male65to66Yrs + Male67to69Yrs + Male70to74Yrs + Male75to79Yrs +
      Male80to84Yrs + MaleGE85Yrs +
      Female65to66Yrs + Female67to69Yrs + Female70to74Yrs + Female75to79Yrs +
      Female80to84Yrs + FemaleGE85Yrs,

    TotAdult18plus = Q1_18_34 + Q2_35_49 + Q3_50_64 + Q4_65plus,

    Sij = f1 * Q1_18_34 +
          f2 * Q2_35_49 +
          f3 * Q3_50_64 +
          f4 * Q4_65plus
  )

split_component_tracts <- function(x) {
  trimws(unlist(strsplit(x, ",")))
}

find_bg_partner <- function(target_bg, all_bgs, flagged_bgs, already_used) {
  idx <- match(target_bg, all_bgs)

  offsets <- c(rbind(seq(1, length(all_bgs)), -seq(1, length(all_bgs))))
  offsets <- offsets[!is.na(offsets)]

  for (off in offsets) {
    j <- idx + off
    if (j >= 1 && j <= length(all_bgs)) {
      cand <- all_bgs[j]
      if (cand != target_bg &&
          !(cand %in% already_used) &&
          !(cand %in% flagged_bgs)) {
        return(cand)
      }
    }
  }
  return(NA_character_)
}

process_one_psu_stage2 <- function(psu_row, bg_data, qbarbar, f1, f2, f3, f4,
                                   mos_tol = 1e-8) {

  psu_id <- psu_row$PSU_ID
  component_tracts <- split_component_tracts(psu_row$component_tracts)

  ## BG frame within sampled PSU
  bg_i <- bg_data %>%
    filter(Tract %in% component_tracts) %>%
    arrange(BlockGroup) %>%
    mutate(
      PSU_ID = psu_id,
      pi1 = psu_row$pi1,
      PSU_Si = psu_row$Si,
      must_combine = (Sij <= 0) | (TotAdult18plus < qbarbar),
      SSU_ID = BlockGroup,
      combine_status = "single"
    )

  if (nrow(bg_i) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No BGs found in sampled PSU", psu_id))
  }

  ## map of BG combinations
  combine_map_i <- data.frame(
    PSU_ID = character(0),
    bg_small = character(0),
    bg_partner = character(0),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  flagged_bgs <- bg_i %>%
    filter(must_combine) %>%
    pull(BlockGroup)

  ## special case:
  ## if all BGs in this PSU are flagged, combine them all into one SSU
  if (length(flagged_bgs) == nrow(bg_i) && nrow(bg_i) > 0) {

    all_bg_id <- paste(sort(bg_i$BlockGroup), collapse = "_")
    bg_i <- bg_i %>%
      mutate(
        SSU_ID = all_bg_id,
        combine_status = "all_combined"
      )

    if (nrow(bg_i) >= 2) {
      combine_map_i <- data.frame(
        PSU_ID = rep(psu_id, nrow(bg_i) - 1),
        bg_small = bg_i$BlockGroup[1:(nrow(bg_i) - 1)],
        bg_partner = bg_i$BlockGroup[2:nrow(bg_i)],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }

  } else {

    used_as_partner <- character(0)
    all_bgs_in_order <- bg_i$BlockGroup

    if (length(flagged_bgs) > 0) {
      for (bgid in flagged_bgs) {
        if (!(bgid %in% combine_map_i$bg_small) &&
            !(bgid %in% used_as_partner)) {

          partner <- find_bg_partner(
            target_bg = bgid,
            all_bgs = all_bgs_in_order,
            flagged_bgs = flagged_bgs,
            already_used = used_as_partner
          )

          if (!is.na(partner)) {
            combine_map_i <- bind_rows(
              combine_map_i,
              data.frame(
                PSU_ID = psu_id,
                bg_small = bgid,
                bg_partner = partner,
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE
              )
            )
            used_as_partner <- c(used_as_partner, partner)
          }
        }
      }
    }

    ## assign combined SSU IDs
    if (nrow(combine_map_i) > 0) {
      for (k in 1:nrow(combine_map_i)) {
        a <- combine_map_i$bg_small[k]
        b <- combine_map_i$bg_partner[k]
        new_id <- paste0(a, "_", b)

        bg_i$SSU_ID[bg_i$BlockGroup %in% c(a, b)] <- new_id
        bg_i$combine_status[bg_i$BlockGroup == a] <- "small_combined"
        bg_i$combine_status[bg_i$BlockGroup == b] <- "partner_combined"
      }
    }
  }

  ## combined stage-2 frame within PSU
  frame2_i <- bg_i %>%
    group_by(PSU_ID, SSU_ID) %>%
    summarise(
      component_bgs = paste(sort(BlockGroup), collapse = ","),
      component_tracts = paste(sort(unique(Tract)), collapse = ","),
      n_bgs_combined = n(),
      NAME = paste(NAME, collapse = " | "),
      TotHH = sum(TotHH, na.rm = TRUE),
      TotPerson = sum(TotPerson, na.rm = TRUE),
      TotAdult18plus = sum(TotAdult18plus, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q1_18_34 = sum(Q1_18_34, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q2_35_49 = sum(Q2_35_49, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q3_50_64 = sum(Q3_50_64, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q4_65plus = sum(Q4_65plus, na.rm = TRUE),
      Sij = sum(Sij, na.rm = TRUE),
      pi1 = first(pi1),
      PSU_Si = first(PSU_Si),
      min_bg = min(BlockGroup),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(min_bg)

  ## check BG-based MOS against first-stage PSU MOS
  Si_check <- sum(frame2_i$Sij, na.rm = TRUE)
  mos_diff <- abs(Si_check - frame2_i$PSU_Si[1])

  if (mos_diff > mos_tol) {
    stop(paste("MOS inconsistency in PSU", psu_id,
               ": sum(Sij) =", round(Si_check, 8),
               "but PSU_Si =", round(frame2_i$PSU_Si[1], 8)))
  }

  frame2_i <- frame2_i %>%
    mutate(
      Si_check = Si_check,
      mos_diff = mos_diff,
      pi2_cond = Sij / PSU_Si,
      pi_joint = pi1 * pi2_cond,
      base_weight = 1 / pi_joint,
      rate_d1 = qbarbar * f1 / Sij,
      rate_d2 = qbarbar * f2 / Sij,
      rate_d3 = qbarbar * f3 / Sij,
      rate_d4 = qbarbar * f4 / Sij,
      fail_after = (Sij <= 0) | (TotAdult18plus < qbarbar) | (pi2_cond > 1)
    )

  ## if any SSU still fails after combining, stop
  if (any(frame2_i$fail_after)) {
    stop(paste("Second-stage QC failed in PSU", psu_id,
               ": some SSUs remain infeasible after combining"))
  }

  ## systematic PPS: select 1 BG/SSU
  s_ssu <- UPsystematic(frame2_i$pi2_cond)

  sample2_i <- frame2_i %>%
    mutate(sample_ssu = as.integer(s_ssu)) %>%
    filter(sample_ssu == 1)

  ## QC note: if only one final SSU remains, stage 2 is deterministic in this PSU
  deterministic_i <- data.frame(
    PSU_ID = psu_id,
    n_final_ssu = nrow(frame2_i),
    deterministic_stage2 = (nrow(frame2_i) == 1),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  list(
    frame2 = frame2_i,
    sample2 = sample2_i,
    combine_map = combine_map_i,
    deterministic = deterministic_i
  )
}


## 17. Run second-stage selection over sampled PSUs
stage2_results <- vector("list", nrow(psu_sample))

for (ii in seq_len(nrow(psu_sample))) {
  stage2_results[[ii]] <- process_one_psu_stage2(
    psu_row = psu_sample[ii, ],
    bg_data = bg,
    qbarbar = qbarbar,
    f1 = f1, f2 = f2, f3 = f3, f4 = f4
  )
}

frame2_out <- bind_rows(lapply(stage2_results, `[[`, "frame2"))
sample2_out <- bind_rows(lapply(stage2_results, `[[`, "sample2"))
bg_combine_out <- bind_rows(lapply(stage2_results, `[[`, "combine_map"))
qc2_deterministic <- bind_rows(lapply(stage2_results, `[[`, "deterministic"))


## 18. Required QC summary
qc2_required <- frame2_out %>%
  filter(fail_after) %>%
  select(
    PSU_ID, SSU_ID, component_bgs, component_tracts,
    TotAdult18plus, Sij, pi2_cond, fail_after
  )

qc2_deterministic_only <- qc2_deterministic %>%
  filter(deterministic_stage2)

summary_second_stage <- data.frame(
  sampled_PSUs_from_stage1 = nrow(psu_sample),
  final_SSUs_in_FRAME2 = nrow(frame2_out),
  sampled_SSUs = nrow(sample2_out),
  number_of_BG_combine_pairs = nrow(bg_combine_out),
  flagged_SSUs_after_combining = nrow(qc2_required),
  deterministic_PSUs_at_stage2 = nrow(qc2_deterministic_only),
  min_pi2 = min(frame2_out$pi2_cond, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_pi2 = max(frame2_out$pi2_cond, na.rm = TRUE),
  min_pij = min(frame2_out$pi_joint, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_pij = max(frame2_out$pi_joint, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_mos_diff = max(frame2_out$mos_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
)

print(summary_second_stage)
print(qc2_required)
print(qc2_deterministic_only)

## 19. Final files
FRAME2_second_stage <- frame2_out %>%
  select(
    PSU_ID, component_tracts,
    SSU_ID, component_bgs, n_bgs_combined,
    NAME,
    TotHH, TotPerson, TotAdult18plus,
    Q1_18_34, Q2_35_49, Q3_50_64, Q4_65plus,
    Sij, PSU_Si, Si_check, mos_diff, pi2_cond
  ) %>%
  arrange(PSU_ID, SSU_ID)

SAMPLE2_second_stage <- sample2_out %>%
  select(
    PSU_ID, component_tracts,
    SSU_ID, component_bgs, n_bgs_combined,
    NAME,
    TotHH, TotPerson, TotAdult18plus,
    Q1_18_34, Q2_35_49, Q3_50_64, Q4_65plus,
    PSU_Si, Sij,
    pi1, pi2_cond, pi_joint, base_weight,
    rate_d1, rate_d2, rate_d3, rate_d4
  ) %>%
  arrange(PSU_ID, SSU_ID)

write.csv(FRAME2_second_stage,
          "FRAME2_second_stage_BG.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(SAMPLE2_second_stage,
          "SAMPLE2_second_stage_selected_BG.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(bg_combine_out,
          "BG_COMBINING_MAP_second_stage.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(qc2_required,
          "QC_second_stage_required.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(qc2_deterministic_only,
          "QC_second_stage_deterministic_PSUs.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_second_stage,
          "SUMMARY_second_stage.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```
